positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a friendly woodland animal—specifically a smiling fox with a bushy tail and a clever demeanor—interacting with stylized botanical elements like oversized ferns and glowing mushrooms. The composition should be highly symmetrical, focusing the fox centrally and balancing the surrounding nature elements around it. Use a vibrant, yet muted forest palette: deep teals, burnt orange, cream, and moss green. The style should be a harmonious blend of vintage storybook illustration and minimalist linework, suitable for high-contrast screen printing. Clean silhouettes are mandatory. Crisp, bold lines, excellent clarity, centered composition, forest magic, stylized animals, botanical elements, vibrant color blocks.
negative: blurry, realistic, photorealistic, grainy, dirty, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, abstract, messy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, cropped, out of frame
